title: City College Student Studio: Cozy 1-Bed Home

about.summary: City College student studio located in the Kleious building near City Centre Thessaloniki. This cozy studio is ideal for students, Erasmus students, and digital nomads looking for student accommodation in Ano Poli.

sections.title: City College Student Studio Guide
sections.content: This studio offers an excellent base for your studies. It features a 1 Bedroom / 1 Bed configuration, making it a cozy private setup. You will find everything needed for your academic year.
highlights: Fully equipped: The studio has the essentials for student accommodation.
Erasmus housing: Ideal for Erasmus students wanting to experience Ano Poli.
Flexible stay: Great setup for digital nomads needing a reliable workspace.

sections.title: Location near City Centre Thessaloniki
sections.content: Located closely to City Centre Thessaloniki, the building places you at the beginning of Ano Poli. All your daily errands are a breeze with multiple shops nearby. Exploring the city is fast and hassle-free.
highlights: Everything nearby: Supermarkets and cafes are around 50 meters away.
University access: Aristotle University and City College are within easy walking distance.
Walkable area: The commercial center is a 5-10 minute walk, keeping bus use low.

sections.title: Bills, Services & Links
sections.content: Maintenance, water, and Wi-Fi are included in the rent. Electricity is paid separately based on consumption. For more details on city life, check out this Thessaloniki travel guide. We would love to host you in this comfortable studio. Check out our other Kleious listings.

house_rules.additional_rules_info: Playing musical instruments: negotiable. Not suitable for couples. Tenant type: students and working professionals. Age and gender: no preference.

seo.seo_title: City College Student Studio: Cozy 1-Bed Home
seo.seo_description: City College student studio ideal for Erasmus students. This cozy 1-bed home is near Aristotle University, ideal for digital nomads.
